creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you Yuri

  +pybind11>:devel/pybind11 \
  +${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}pybind11>0:devel/py-pybind11@${PY_FLAVOR} \

Top one looks spurious and a dupe of the second

Can you also confirm QA (poudriere) on supported archs/python versions? With that I can approve you to commit, else someone else (on python) to take and QA/commit
